CustomField.description: The coordinator who sent the Certificate K to the development. Will default autofill to the first user who saves after a date is entered in the "Date Cert K Sent to Development" field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The coordinator who sent the Certificate K to the development. Will default autofill to the first user who saves after a date is entered in the "Date Cert K Sent to Development" field.
CustomField.label: Cert K Sent to Development By
